description_long: This bungalow features a modern, spacious layout with a central main building flanked by two side structures, likely serving as a garage and a pool house. The main entrance is accentuated by a portico with columns, leading to a manicured front lawn and a paved driveway lined with evenly spaced trees. The roof is predominantly gabled, with multiple intersecting sections adding architectural interest. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard includes a patio area and a swimming pool, enclosed by privacy fencing and landscaping.
description: A modern bungalow with a gabled roof, symmetrical front windows, a columned entrance, and landscaped grounds featuring a driveway, patio, and pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with columns, central lawn, and adjacent garage and pool house.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the tree-lined driveway leading to the front entrance and the side garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio, pool area, and the intersecting gabled rooflines.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the driveway, side structure, and the arrangement of windows and doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
